title: dolichos geminus
intro: Dolichos geminus, also known as the horse gram or Macrotyloma uniflorum, is a type of leguminous plant native to the Indian subcontinent. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, possessing medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Dolichos geminus include reducing blood sugar levels, improving digestion, and supporting kidney function, making it a valuable herb for managing various health conditions. Dolichos geminus can be prepared as a decoction, powder, or oil, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine, as well as in modern herbal remedies.
